description: La Barredora is a Mexican criminal gang based in Tabasco, formed in 2008 as a split-off from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel. It operates primarily in Acapulco and surrounding states, engaging in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, murder, kidnapping, arms trafficking, and illegal fuel extraction. The group is known for its rivalry with the Independent Cartel of Acapulco and links to the Sinaloa Cartel. Its leader, Hernán Bermúdez Requena, was captured in Paraguay in 2025.
